projectDescription: A Svelte 5 component for rendering ASCII art as scalable SVG with optional grid overlay and frame
keyFeatures: Renders ASCII art as scalable SVG
Optional grid overlay with customizable styling
Export to SVG with embedded styles
Export to PNG with scale factor support
TypeScript support with full type definitions
publicApiSurface: exportSvg(svgEl, options) - Export SVG with styles
svgStringToPng(svgString, options) - Convert SVG string to PNG
ExportSvgOptions - Type for SVG export options
ExportPngOptions - Type for PNG export options
SvgStringToPngOptions - Type for string conversion options
